footer.faq:
Have questions? We have prepared a [Questions and Answers](https://do-pracy.pl/pomoc) section.
If needed, please visit our [Contact](https://do-pracy.pl/kontakt) page.

Kind regards,
The do-pracy.pl Team

sendBackupChangedEmail.paragraph1: Your email address has been changed back on the do-pracy.pl platform.
sendBackupChangedEmail.subject: Your email address has been changed back on the do-pracy.pl platform

sendChangedEmail.paragraph1: Your email address has been changed on the do-pracy.pl platform.
sendChangedEmail.paragraph2: If this wasn’t you, please click the link below. It’s valid for 24 hours only.
sendChangedEmail.subject: Your email address has been changed on the do-pracy.pl platform

sendChangedPassword.paragraph1: Your password has been changed on the do-pracy.pl platform.
sendChangedPassword.subject: Your password has been changed on the do-pracy.pl platform

sendEmailIsVerified.paragraph1: Your email address has been successfully verified using the verification code. This is an important step in securing your account. 😎
sendEmailIsVerified.paragraph2: If you didn’t perform this action, please contact our support team so we can assist you. 😥
sendEmailIsVerified.subject: Email address verified on the do-pracy.pl platform
sendEmailIsVerified.title: Congratulations! 😀

sendEmailOTPCode.paragraph1: To complete the two-step authentication process, please copy the code below:
sendEmailOTPCode.paragraph2: Then enter this code in the appropriate field to finish the activation process.
sendEmailOTPCode.subject: Two-step authentication code for the do-pracy.pl platform

sendInvoice.paragraph1: Attached you will find the VAT invoice for our services. Please review the attached document.
sendInvoice.paragraph2: If you have any questions or concerns, feel free to contact us.
sendInvoice.subject: VAT invoice for our services - attached

sendListingExtensionPaymentFailed.paragraph1: The payment for renewing your listing on our platform has failed. We understand that such situations can happen.
sendListingExtensionPaymentFailed.paragraph2: To extend your listing, please repeat the payment process. We’re here to help if needed.
sendListingExtensionPaymentFailed.paragraph3: Your listing renewal will be possible once the payment is successfully processed.
sendListingExtensionPaymentFailed.paragraph4: Thank you for using our platform. If you have any questions, feel free to contact us — we’re happy to help!
sendListingExtensionPaymentFailed.subject: Failed payment for listing renewal on the do-pracy.pl platform

sendRecoveryAccountPassword.paragraph1: We understand you’re having trouble accessing your account on the do-pracy.pl platform. We’d like to help you recover it so you can continue using our services.
sendRecoveryAccountPassword.paragraph2: Please click the link below to start the account recovery process:
sendRecoveryAccountPassword.subject: Account recovery on the do-pracy.pl platform

sendSmsCreditsPurchased.paragraph1: Thank you for purchasing SMS credits on our platform! We appreciate your trust and are glad to help you communicate effectively.
sendSmsCreditsPurchased.paragraph2: Your purchase is currently being processed. Once complete, the SMS credits will be available in your account for immediate use.
sendSmsCreditsPurchased.paragraph3: If you have any questions or need support, our team is here to assist you. Feel free to reach out anytime.
sendSmsCreditsPurchased.paragraph4: Thank you again for choosing our platform. You’ll soon be able to fully use your purchased SMS credits to achieve your communication goals!
sendSmsCreditsPurchased.subject: SMS credit purchase on the do-pracy.pl platform

sendSubscriptionCancelled.paragraph1: We have received your request to cancel your subscription on our platform. Your subscription will remain active until the end of the current billing period.
sendSubscriptionCancelled.paragraph2: During this time, you can continue using all subscription features. After the billing period ends, your subscription will automatically expire, and your account will revert to the free version.
sendSubscriptionCancelled.paragraph3: If you change your mind or wish to renew your subscription in the future, we’ll be happy to welcome you back anytime.
sendSubscriptionCancelled.paragraph4: Thank you for using our platform. We hope our services met your expectations. If you have any questions, we’re here to help.
sendSubscriptionCancelled.subject: Subscription cancellation on the do-pracy.pl platform
sendSubscriptionCancelled.title2: Subscription active until end of billing period

sendSubscriptionCreated.paragraph1: Thank you for purchasing a subscription on our platform! We appreciate your trust and are pleased to inform you that your subscription activation process has started.
sendSubscriptionCreated.paragraph2: Your purchase is currently being processed. Once complete, all subscription features will be automatically activated, giving you full access to our resources.
sendSubscriptionCreated.paragraph3: If you have any questions or need assistance, our team is ready to help and ensure the best possible experience.
sendSubscriptionCreated.paragraph4: Thank you once again for choosing our platform. You’ll soon enjoy all the benefits of your subscription!
sendSubscriptionCreated.subject: Subscription purchase on the do-pracy.pl platform

sendSubscriptionDeleted.paragraph1: Your subscription on our platform has been successfully canceled and is now inactive. From now on, your account has reverted to the free version with limited features.
sendSubscriptionDeleted.paragraph2: If you decide to regain full access in the future, we’ll be happy to welcome you back. You can renew your subscription anytime to unlock all platform features.
sendSubscriptionDeleted.paragraph3: Thank you for using our platform. We hope our services met your expectations. If you need help or have questions, we’re here for you.
sendSubscriptionDeleted.subject: Subscription canceled on the do-pracy.pl platform

sendSubscriptionPaymentFailed.paragraph1: The attempt to charge your subscription payment on our platform has failed. We understand this can happen, so we’ll automatically retry the payment.
sendSubscriptionPaymentFailed.paragraph2: There will be a total of 3 payment attempts. If issues persist, we’ll contact you to assist in resolving them.
sendSubscriptionPaymentFailed.paragraph3: The next payment attempt will occur on:
sendSubscriptionPaymentFailed.paragraph4: Thank you for using our platform. If you have questions, please reach out — we’re here to help!
sendSubscriptionPaymentFailed.subject: Failed subscription payment on the do-pracy.pl platform

sendSubscriptionTrialEndingWithBilling.paragraph1: Your trial period on our platform is coming to an end. Thank you for trying our services — we hope they met your expectations.
sendSubscriptionTrialEndingWithBilling.paragraph2: After the trial ends, your account will automatically switch to a paid subscription, and your chosen payment method will be charged according to your plan on:
sendSubscriptionTrialEndingWithBilling.paragraph3: If you decide not to continue, you can cancel your subscription in your account settings before the trial ends to avoid charges.
sendSubscriptionTrialEndingWithBilling.paragraph4: Thank you for being with us. If you need assistance, our team is ready to help.
sendSubscriptionTrialEndingWithBilling.subject: End of trial period and upcoming charge

sendSubscriptionUpcoming.paragraph1: This is a reminder that your subscription payment is approaching. Your invoice will be issued soon, and the payment will be automatically charged to your saved card.
sendSubscriptionUpcoming.paragraph2: Once the invoice is issued, your account will be charged according to your selected subscription plan on:
sendSubscriptionUpcoming.paragraph3: If you decide not to continue, you can cancel your subscription in your account settings before the payment date to avoid charges.
sendSubscriptionUpcoming.paragraph4: Thank you for using our platform. If you have any questions or need support, our team is here to help.
sendSubscriptionUpcoming.subject: Upcoming subscription payment reminder
sendSubscriptionUpcoming.title2: Your next payment is coming up

sendVerifiedEmail.paragraph1: To complete the account activation process, please copy the code below:
sendVerifiedEmail.paragraph2: Then go to the login page on our platform and enter the code in the appropriate field to finish activation.
sendVerifiedEmail.paragraph3: Thank you for choosing our service! 😍
sendVerifiedEmail.subject: Activation code for the do-pracy.pl platform
sendVerifiedEmail.title: Welcome to do-pracy.pl! 😎

sendVerifiedNewEmail.paragraph1: To complete the email change process, please copy the code below:
sendVerifiedNewEmail.paragraph2: Then enter this code in the appropriate field to finish activation.
sendVerifiedNewEmail.subject: Activation code for the do-pracy.pl platform
